headline: How The Conagra Brands (CAG) Investment Story Is Shifting As Valuation And Earnings Views Diverge
summary: Conagra Brands is in focus after an updated fair value estimate moved from US$18.75 to US$16.01, a reduction of about 15% in the modelled target. This shift lines up with a split analyst narrative, where more cautious views emphasize earnings risk and balance sheet pressure, while supportive voices point to guidance reaffirmation and valuation support. As you read on, you will see how these competing arguments shape the evolving story and what to watch if you are tracking this stock. Stay...
